allow: Bash(python -c 'import sys,json; msgs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f"Total messages: {len\(msgs\)}"\); [print\(f"  [{m['role']}] {m['content'][:80]}..."\) for m in msgs]')

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Doc:', d['document_title']\); print\('Nodes:', d['total_nodes'], 'Depth:', d['max_depth']\); [print\(f'  [{n[\\"level\\"]}] {n[\\"title\\"][:60]}'\) for n in d['nodes'][:5]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Search results:', len\(d['results']\)\); [print\(f'  - {r[\\"title\\"]}: {r[\\"preview\\"][:80]}'\) for r in d['results'][:5]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Results:', len\(d['results']\)\); [print\(f'  - {r[\\"title\\"]}'\) for r in d['results'][:5]]")

Bash(python -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for item in data: text = item.get\('text',''\) obj = json.loads\(text\) if text.startswith\('{'\) else {} for r in obj.get\('results', []\): title = r.get\('title',''\)[:100] url = r.get\('url',''\) hls = r.get\('highlights', []\) hl = hls[0][:200] if hls else '' print\(f'### {title}'\) print\(f'URL: {url}'\) if hl: print\(f' > {hl}'\) print\(\) ")

Bash(python -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for item in data: text = item.get\('text',''\) obj = json.loads\(text\) if text.startswith\('{'\) else {} for r in obj.get\('results', []\): title = r.get\('title',''\)[:100] url = r.get\('url',''\) hls = r.get\('highlights', []\) hl = hls[0][:250] if hls else '' print\(f'### {title}'\) print\(f'URL: {url}'\) if hl: print\(f' > {hl}'\) print\(\) ")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Login OK, role:', d.get\('role','?'\)\)")
